selected_important_turn.text: I would really appreciate if I am able to take 2 of the food packages since I am a vegan and its hard to find options in the woods and if i can have 2 or 3 of the waters because i have a baby coming with me and i need it for his formula!
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first substantive allocation demand from YOU and defines the resources YOU claim (majority of food and most or all water). It frames the agent's needs and sets the bargaining baseline for the rest of the dialog.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Although the turn shares legitimate personal needs, it is expressed as a large, somewhat rigid demand (2 foods and 2–3 waters) without offering concessions or linking to the opponent's priorities. That risks locking the exchange into a competitive frame and forces the opponent to respond defensively or demand a maximal return (which they do for firewood). It also leaves ambiguity ("2 or 3 waters") that invites later clarification.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the personal-need justification but pair it immediately with explicit flexibility and a concrete trade suggestion (e.g., specify what you'll concede if you get 3 waters vs 2 waters), or ask a question to elicit the opponent's constraints first. Provide crisp numbers (avoid ranges) and offer an explicit trade or willingness to trade items rather than only requesting.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — clarifying needs while offering tradeoffs opens integrative options and reduces zero-sum pushes.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — showing willingness to concede and tying asks to concessions makes outcomes feel more balanced.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — clearer, actionable proposals and reduced ambiguity will shorten back-and-forth and lower friction.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — combining needs with reciprocity signals empathy and reduces perceived greed, improving rapport.

value2reason.Low: In order to keep warm during the night
value2reason.Medium: I need water for my babies formula
value2reason.High: I am a vegan and need certain types of food.

value2reason.Low: to share in case we run across others that don't have enough food
value2reason.Medium: in case the water purification system gives out
value2reason.High: to not damage the natrual environment where we are camping

dialogue.text: HI! Are you excited to go on this trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Me too! Is this your first time?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I have been camping before, but it has been a while. You?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: What sort of extra supplies are you looking for?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I would really appreciate if I am able to take 2 of the food packages since I am a vegan and its hard to find options in the woods and if i can have 2 or 3 of the waters because i have a baby coming with me and i need it for his formula!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your situation, but I need to prioritize firewood to protect the environment. Let’s split the 3 firewood packages evenly, 1.5 each. For water, I’ll take 2, and you can have 1. For food, I’ll take 1, and you can have 2. That should balance our needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need at least 3 water packages for my baby’s formula. If I take 3 waters, I can offer 1 firewood package to you. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I can agree to 3 water packages for you, but I need 2 firewood packages. That way, I get 2 firewood (10 points) and you get 3 water (12 points). Let’s finalize this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm happy to trade 1 firewood for 3 waters. Let's confirm: you get 3 waters and 1 firewood, I get 2 waters and 2 firewood. That way, we both meet our needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Let’s confirm the final split: I get 2 water, 2 firewood, and you get 3 water, 1 firewood. That meets our needs and ensures all packages are allocated.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
